questionHtml:
An object is sliding from rest down a frictionless inclined plane. The object slides 1.0 m during the first second.

What distance will the object slide during the next second?

A.  1.0 m

B.  2.0 m

C.  3.0 m

D.  4.9 m

meta.title: An object is sliding from rest down a frictionless inclined plane. The object slides 1.0 m during the first second. What distance will the object slide during the next second? A. 1
